The tora bugyo is keen to share some tasty treats.

The tora bugyo is keen to share some tasty treats.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
No Heavensturn celebration is complete without advent cakes, the staple sweet of the celebration. To ensure as many people as possible can partake, he offers you a sizable store to take to the mochi daikan on the lower decks of Limsa Lominsa.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
